```python
# test_celsius_to_fahrenheit.py
import math
import pytest

from your_module import celsius_to_fahrenheit  # adjust import to your module name


def test_happy_path_positive_values():
    assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(0) == 32
    assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(100) == 212
    assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(37) == pytest.approx(98.6, rel=1e-12)


def test_happy_path_negative_values():
    assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(-40) == -40
    assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(-273.15) == pytest.approx(-459.67, rel=1e-12)


def test_edge_case_zero_and_fractional():
    assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(0.0) == 32.0
    assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(12.5) == pytest.approx(54.5, rel=1e-12)
    assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(1/3) == pytest.approx((1/3) * 9/5 + 32, rel=1e-12)


def test_edge_case_large_magnitude():
    # Floating-point arithmetic: just check numeric correctness with approx
    c = 1e12
    expected = c * 9 / 5 + 32
    assert celsius_to_fahrenheit(c) == pytest.approx(expected, rel=1e-15)


def test_error_case_incorrect_type_str_raises_typeerror():
    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
        celsius_to_fahrenheit("100")  # type: ignore[arg-type]


def test_error_case_incorrect_type_none_raises_typeerror():
    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
        celsius_to_fahrenheit(None)  # type: ignore[arg-type]


def test_error_case_non_numeric_object_raises_typeerror():
    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
        celsius_to_fahrenheit(object())  # type: ignore[arg-type]


def test_edge_case_nan_and_infinity():
    nan_result = celsius_to_fahrenheit(float("nan"))
    assert math.isnan(nan_result)

    inf_result = celsius_to_fahrenheit(float("inf"))
    assert inf_result == float("inf")

    neg_inf_result = celsius_to_fahrenheit(float("-inf"))
    assert neg_inf_result == float("-inf")
```
